title: Tiger Refuses Human Blood
description: On pages 6–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is tiger refuses human blood.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But worry not.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I promise you still,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Fwush

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: For the sake of your futures ....!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: day after day, Otohime busied herself ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hang in there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: pirates again ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: SAVING SURVIVORS FROM SHIP- WRecks...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let us take you back to the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Teaching the island's children about the world above...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a place where there are lots of those "trees" I told you about yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It is called a "forest".

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: A forest?! like the ocean forest?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: WAP

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: Gathering signatures ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Wait!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Camp- signing on the streets

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Queen Otohime ...

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: Ah! Some of the kind people who have offered their signatures!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right ... we have a request to make.

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: How many signatures have you gathered so far?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have been gathering them for over five years now ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I still have only around one hundred sheets...

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: ...with ten signatures on each sheet. Which makes around one thousand supporters.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since the population of fish-man Island is around five million...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...I feel it is somewhat lacking ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I see. Well, moving on to our request...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If possible... We would like to take back around fifty of those sheets ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What...?

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Your majesty ...

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: QUEEN OTOHIME!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Oh - Hello, children!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you want to hear more about the surface?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My mum asked me to come and get...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...this piece of paper, from before...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We listened to what you have to say... since you are our queen... but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's the humans that are in the wrong, so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We'd appreciate it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...if you'd stop making those speeches, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: every- one's tired of hearing them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Ahhh... the end of another tiring day!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Welcome home, Mother!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hello, my angels! Could you leave me alone for a little while today?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remember everyone who

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're all horrible liars !!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Y - Y - your majesty ...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're broadcasting to the entire country....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: SH - Shadup, left minister!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: H... Have you been drinking ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Shadup!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'm not... *HIC* ...Not drunk!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You clearly are!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What the...?

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: That's Queen Otohime's voice...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why is it?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why is it that we... we who can easily live anywhere in the ocean...!! out of the whole wide waters... the whole dark seabed...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do we all choose to live in this one tiny place?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it not because here, we can see a slight glimmer of sunlight, and breathe a little air?!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Queen Otohime ....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: on the surface....!! The whole world is bathed in sunlight!! The sky is vast and open!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why is it that our children swim up to sneak glimpses of Shabondy Park?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are so many more wonderful places in the world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There shouldn't be anywhere that is beyond our reach!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are we all coming up with empty reasons, convincing ourselves to give up on all that ?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should all have the courage to seek out what we truly want ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If it's the humans that are stopping us, then we should go up there and face them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Your majesty in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...If we do that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...then the future that awaits the children of our land ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...might change a little for the better!!!

summary: Tiger Refuses Human Blood. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
